ops.body: Not a bug — verified 2026-07-04. (a) CommandLine.capture never existed on the released lineage (its removal lives on an unmerged side branch); the 4 test errors came from a stale uv-tool capt-hook 8.0.0, since uninstalled from both machines. (b) evt.tool_response is contractually str|None in released captain-hook (pinned by its own tests); the AttributeError came from the round-2 E2E's own synthetic dict payload, not production. Full hook suite green in CI today: 381/381 (hook-tests job, yasyf/cc-context).
